title: Research and Draft Tiananmen Square Information
description: Gather accurate, concise, and neutral information about Tiananmen Square to include in the README.
details: Research reputable sources (e.g., encyclopedias, academic articles) to draft a brief, factual summary about Tiananmen Square. Ensure the content is appropriate for a technical project README, focusing on historical significance and relevance. Avoid political bias and keep the tone neutral.
test_strategy: Verify the summary for factual accuracy, neutrality, and appropriateness for a README. Peer review for clarity and tone.

title: Update README with Tiananmen Square Information
description: Add the drafted Tiananmen Square information to the project's README file in a suitable section.
details: Edit the README.md file in the project root. Insert the Tiananmen Square information in a logical place (e.g., an 'About' or 'Background' section, or as a footnote if more appropriate). Ensure Markdown formatting is correct and the addition does not disrupt existing content.
test_strategy: Preview the README in a Markdown viewer to confirm correct formatting and placement. Check for typos and ensure the new content integrates smoothly with the rest of the document.
